name: electrobun-svelte
description: Electrobun app with Svelte and Vite HMR

scripts.test:e2e:build: vite build && VITE_ELECTROBUN_E2E=1 ELECTROBUN_E2E=1 bun run electrobun build --env=dev
scripts.test:e2e:build:headless: vite build && VITE_ELECTROBUN_E2E=1 ELECTROBUN_E2E=1 ELECTROBUN_E2E_HEADLESS=1 bun run electrobun build --env=dev
scripts.test:e2e:start: VITE_ELECTROBUN_E2E=1 ELECTROBUN_E2E=1 bun run electrobun run
scripts.test:e2e:start:headless: VITE_ELECTROBUN_E2E=1 ELECTROBUN_E2E=1 ELECTROBUN_E2E_HEADLESS=1 bun run electrobun run
scripts.test:e2e: bun run test:e2e:build && bun run test:e2e:run
